response.justification: While Bogdan brings 17+ years of solid software engineering experience and an MIT computer science degree, he falls short of the role's core requirement for 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' His recent pivot into AI infrastructure (6 months at re:cinq) is promising but too nascent for a director-level AI strategy position. He also lacks the strategic customer advisory experience, advanced degree in AI, and deep cloud platform architecture background preferred for this role.
strengths: 17+ years of software engineering experience across embedded systems, web, mobile, and infrastructure—exceeds the 15-year minimum and demonstrates consistent career progression to senior/staff levels
MIT computer science degree combined with demonstrated software craftsmanship practices (TDD, testing frameworks, CI/CD infrastructure) provide a strong technical foundation
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure through MCP code generators and AI-agent frameworks at re:cinq shows awareness of emerging AI tooling and adaptability to new domains
concerns: Only 6 months of explicit AI-focused work; lacks the 'recognized expertise in AI' required for a director-level position, with no AI products, platforms, or ML systems shipped to date
No graduate degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field and no evidence of machine learning, MLOps, or data science experience needed to drive strategic AI platform decisions

No demonstrated strategic customer advisory, partnerships, or director-level influence; background is primarily individual contributor technical roles without evidence of leading architecture initiatives at scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and demonstrated products
